model.license: CC-BY-4.0; redistribution and commercial use require attribution

runtime.boundary: official Python/NeMo path on Linux and NVIDIA GPU hardware

energy.notes: No accepted Apple-local runtime reached inference.

engineering_cost.conversion_effort: An Apple port would combine the Canary audio encoder, projection, Qwen decoder, prompt format, and model conversion.
engineering_cost.update_cost: Cuttledoc would own parity with both NeMo Canary and Qwen revisions.
engineering_cost.packaging_cost: The BF16 model is substantially larger than the measured Qwen3-ASR 0.6B path while adding only English ASR coverage.

reproduction.command: No benchmark command: the pinned official model is English-only and has no accepted Apple-local runtime.

result.blocker: The exact artifact is CC-BY-4.0 rather than non-commercial, but the official NeMo runtime targets Linux/NVIDIA and the model is English-only. It cannot satisfy the common multilingual matrix or justify a larger new Apple adapter over the measured Qwen3-ASR 0.6B reference.
observations: The model card explicitly warns that non-English transcription is unlikely to be reliable.
The measured Qwen3-ASR 0.6B reference is smaller and covers every matrix language.
No stale non-commercial-family label is applied to this artifact.
